description: Send a message card to a Microsoft Teams channel via an Incoming Webhook URL.

WEBHOOK_URL_SECRET.description: Secret key_path storing the Teams Incoming Webhook URL (e.g. teams/webhook_url)

TITLE.description: Optional card title displayed at the top of the Teams message

TEXT.description: Message body text. Markdown is supported.

COLOR.description: Hex accent color for the message card

setup_instructions.title: Add an Incoming Webhook connector
setup_instructions.detail: In your Microsoft Teams channel, click the '...' menu → Connectors → Incoming Webhook → Configure.

setup_instructions.title: Create and copy the webhook URL
setup_instructions.detail: Give the webhook a name, optionally upload an icon, then click 'Create'. Copy the generated webhook URL.

setup_instructions.title: Store the URL as a secret
setup_instructions.detail: Use set_secret with key_path='teams/webhook_url' and the copied URL as the value.

setup_instructions.title: Configure this node
setup_instructions.detail: Set WEBHOOK_URL_SECRET='teams/webhook_url' on this node, then optionally set TITLE, TEXT, and COLOR.
